greeting: Hey — I'm the AI assistant. Want a quote or just have a question?

faq.a: We install branded AI chatbots that capture leads 24/7 and answer FAQs instantly.
Usually within 24–48 hours depending on your site and content.

faq.q: What do you need from me?
faq.a: Your logo/colors, top FAQs, services, hours, and any pricing rules.

lead_offer: If you want, leave your name + email/phone and I'll follow up.
